name: Two Cheese Seafood Linguine
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook Linguine according to package directions.
2. While the Linguine is cooking, heat garlic, oregano, and butter 1 minute in a saucepan, stirring frequently.
3. Add tomato and continue to cook for 3 minutes or until the tomato is cooked.
4. Add shrimp and cook until just pink.
5. Add the remaining ingredients.
6. Cook covered until cheese melts and sauce is hot.
7. Serve over drained Linguine.
You can substitute lobster, crab, or any other seafood in place of the shrimp. This is a quick and easy dish to prepare and quite delicious.
